svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="9Xo-7cYyEOuly1IHR1gE"> <mxGraphModel dx="3433" dy="1927" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant Handler as StoreMovimientoHandler
 participant Aggregate as Movimiento
 participant Repo as EloquentMovimientoRepository
 participant EventBus as LaravelEventBus
 participant FinancialH as MovimientoCreatedFinancialImpactEventHandler
 participant CuentaRepo as EloquentCuentaRepository
 participant UploadH as UploadAttachmentsWhenMovimientoIsWrittenEventHandler
 participant AuditH as AuditoriaEventHandler

 Handler->>Aggregate: Movimiento::create(id, nombre, cuenta_id, ...)
 Aggregate->>Aggregate: validateData(nombre, monto)
 Aggregate->>Aggregate: recordThat(new MovimientoCreated($this))
 Aggregate-->>Handler: $movimiento

 Handler->>Repo: store($movimiento)
 Repo->>Repo: model->create($movimiento->toPrimitive())
 Repo->>EventBus: publishMany($movimiento->releaseEvents())
 Note over EventBus: [MovimientoCreated]
 EventBus->>FinancialH: MovimientoCreated
 FinancialH->>CuentaRepo: findById($movimiento->getCuentaId())
 FinancialH->>FinancialH: transactionValidatorResolver->resolve()
 FinancialH->>FinancialH: applyTransactionEffectResolver->resolve()
 FinancialH->>CuentaRepo: update($cuenta)

 Handler->>EventBus: publish(AttachmentsForMovimientoCreated)
 EventBus->>UploadH: Handle file uploads to storage

 Handler->>EventBus: publish(AuditableActionOcurred)
 EventBus->>AuditH: Persist to auditorias table",
 "config": null
}" id="Uv1j65Hq4k6NISh9Ke3y-1"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1360" width="2598"
